title: Video Logic
description: Video Logic is a multi-function Boolean and comparison stage for 1V video-rate signals: you get NAND, OR, and window-style logic, plus a dedicated voltage comparator in one Orion-series module—handy for key shaping, gating, and non-linear control before colorization or mixing. Truth tables, normals, and patch ideas: Manual. Physical layout: Specs.

seo.title: Video Logic | LZX Industries
seo.description: Video Logic: Boolean + comparator for 1V video (LZX Orion). See Manual and Specs.
